name: Chargebacks911 Dispute Management API
what_it_does: Chargeback management and dispute resolution platform with REST API — helping merchants fight chargebacks through automated evidence gathering, compelling evidence submission to card networks, chargeback analytics by reason code and BIN, representment win rate tracking, and fraud signal integration to prevent future disputes.
use_cases: Submitting chargeback dispute evidence programmatically via Chargebacks911 API
Querying chargeback analytics by reason code, BIN, and processor for risk analysis
Integrating dispute status updates with order management systems for case tracking
Automating evidence package assembly from order data for representment filing
Pulling chargeback win rates and recovery amounts for financial reporting
not_for: Real-time transaction fraud scoring (use Kount or Riskified for transaction risk)
Payment processing and gateway (use Stripe or Braintree for payments)
Consumer-side dispute filing (Chargebacks911 is merchant-side only)
best_when: An ecommerce merchant or payment facilitator experiencing chargeback losses wants automated evidence submission and dispute management to increase win rates and reduce manual back-office work.
avoid_when: You need real-time transaction fraud prevention, payment processing, or are under the 1% chargeback threshold where the ROI on dispute management tooling is unclear.

auth.notes: API key from Chargebacks911 merchant portal. Bearer token auth. Merchant-scoped access. Webhook for dispute status changes and outcome notifications. PCI DSS considerations for payment data in evidence. No OAuth2.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-case pricing or monthly subscription; contact sales
pricing.notes: Tampa, FL-based company. Founded 2011. Largest dedicated chargeback management company. CB911 Intelligent Source Detection (ISD) differentiates friendly fraud from criminal fraud. Merchant Recovery Service for representment. Compelling Evidence 3.0 (CE3.0) support for Visa disputes. Over 400 employees. Handles 40M+ transactions annually. Strong in ecommerce, travel, and subscription businesses.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per merchant account

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for chargeback cases, evidence submission, and analytics. Bearer token auth. Moderate documentation. Evidence submission requires PCI DSS-compliant data handling. Case creation tied to specific dispute from payment processor. Webhook for case status changes and win/loss outcomes.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Case reads fully idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by period. Evidence reads idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: PCI DSS compliance required for handling payment card data in evidence
Chargeback deadlines are strict — evidence must be submitted within 7-10 days
CE3.0 Visa disputes require specific evidence format — verify compliance
Case data linked to payment processor chargeback notifications — processor integration required
Win rate depends on chargeback reason code — ISD classification required before strategy

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. PCI DSS and SOC2 compliant. US data residency. Bearer token auth. Payment transaction data in chargeback evidence requires PCI DSS Level compliance. Cardholder data is highly sensitive — implement tokenization before API submission. Chargeback outcomes affect financial records — audit trail required.
